name: mypham14
css: .mp-wrap{width:100%;height:100%;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#0d0d1a;border-radius:8px}.mp-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 60% 40%,#1a0a3d 0%,#0d0d1a 70%);animation:mp-pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite}.mp-content{position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:clamp(6px,2vh,14px)}.mp-name{font-family:monospace;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,5vw,2.4rem);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:#c084fc;text-shadow:0 0 10px #a855f7,0 0 30px #7c3aed,0 0 60px #4c1d95;animation:mp-glow 2.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate}.mp-dots{display:flex;gap:clamp(6px,1.5vw,12px)}.mp-dots span{width:clamp(6px,1.5vw,10px);height:clamp(6px,1.5vw,10px);border-radius:50%;background:#a855f7;animation:mp-bounce 1.2s ease-in-out infinite}.mp-dots span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:0.2s;background:#818cf8}.mp-dots span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:0.4s;background:#38bdf8}@keyframes mp-glow{from{text-shadow:0 0 10px #a855f7,0 0 30px #7c3aed,0 0 60px #4c1d95}to{text-shadow:0 0 20px #c084fc,0 0 50px #a855f7,0 0 90px #7c3aed}}@keyframes mp-bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(clamp(-8px,-2vh,-4px))}}@keyframes mp-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0.7}}
